title: SpaceFrog's Better Ribbits
description: Works with the Ribbits mod: give your froggy villagers increased health, the regeneration effect, & jump boot 5. Now Ribbits won't die so easily & can hop around like real frogs!
body:
The [**_Ribbits_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/ribbits) mod by Joo5h is an amazing mod, but these froggy villagers tend to find ways of dying, which is sad :,[

To remedy this problem, this datapack increases their health to 20HP and permanently gives them the **Regeneration** effect. Not only that, but they also receive **Jump Boost 5**, letting them hop around and jump as high as their vanilla Minecraft frog friends.

Your Ribbits will thank you for these enhancements!
